details: Integration tests calling `analyze` and `badge` failed because `analysis` feature was not enabled

command: bash -c 'for file in crates/tokmd/tests/*.rs; do if ! grep -q "feature = \"analysis\"" "$file"; then if grep -qE "(\"analyze\"|\"badge\"|\"baseline\"|\"gate\"|\"run\")" "$file"; then echo "Updating $file"; echo "#![cfg(feature = \"analysis\")]" | cat - "$file" > temp && mv temp "$file"; fi; fi; done'
